roa.docketEntryComment: DEFT BAIL MOT&ORDER RELEASING DEFT ON O/R FILED

/CAL PRELIMINARY HEARING/X THE PEOPLE'S ORAL MOTION TO ADD COUNT 3, A MISEMEANOR CHARGE OF 459PC IN THE SECOND DEGREE, IS GRANTED/IRRC/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA(S) OF NL/DEFT ADV NL:3/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/CONT/DOPC/LD:09-03-20/12    XPROC RE BW;/TEXT:BENCH WARRANT STAYED AND CONT'D/NP/X:  NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT; A BENCH WARRANT IS ORDERED AND STAYED TO 09-03-20/X: BAIL SET AT $2,500/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/X:THE PEOPLE ORAL AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO STATE THAT COUNT1 OCCURED ON MARCH 9, 2020/ /TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX:09-03-20/987,2/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAKGROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/SAORD/SA2:695 5TH ST, SF/SAORD4 50 YARDS/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING/TE:1 HOUR 15MIN/DOP/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/NP/X:CASE IS IN LOVE WAIVER STATUS/CONT/DOPC/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/CONT/DOP/EMTERM/CTORD:THAT THE GPS DEVICE BE REMOVED FROM THE DEFENDANT/LD:09-03-20/
